name: The Black Captain
background: Leader of the free company that took the keep

techniques.name: Cleave
techniques.description: A heavy two-handed swing meant to hew straight through shield and man alike.

techniques.name: Warhammer Crush
techniques.description: An overhead hammer blow that caves armor and shatters what it covers.

personality: Pragmatic and cold, not a monster — he took the keep for coin and would sell it back for more. Respects a real fighter and despises a wasted life, including his own men's.
tone: Even, confident, faintly amused; the calm of a man who has done this many times.
